training_status: lifting consistently 4-6 days per week for 3 years

benefits.description: Lost 14 pounds over 12 weeks (from 143 to 129 lbs), previously struggled to lose weight with increased cardio and calorie reduction
Client feeling very happy with results

protocol_notes: Female client, 5'3", started at 143 lbs at beginning of week 1. Semaglutide protocol: started at 0.25 mg and worked up to 1 mg weekly. Used for 12 weeks with significant fat loss despite previous difficulty losing weight through traditional methods. Planning to continue for another 12 weeks before considering additional compounds.
